title: Judge's powers at chambers
doc_html:
PART III.  JUDGE

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§581.  Judge's powers at chambers

District judges may grant at chambers all orders not required by law to be granted in open court.
doc_text:
PART III.  JUDGE
SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS
§581.  Judge's powers at chambers
District judges may grant at chambers all orders not required by law to be granted in open court.
